1:100.name: wordmark
1:100.description: clawmachine — Satoshi 700, lowercase, scheme-primary accent on 'machine' token.

1:200.name: nav-row
1:200.description: Sidebar nav row, JetBrains Mono 11 / 1.32 tracking, inset bevel on active.

1:500.name: topbar
1:500.description: Per-page topbar — Satoshi title in page-accent + mono status pills.

1:600.name: kpi-card
1:600.description: 120-px dense card: mono label, 22-px mono value, delta in gain/loss token.

1:700.name: panel
1:700.description: Panel with 40-px head, zebra rows, inset bevel highlight.

T:1.name: style-systems/01-CATHODE WORSHIP
T:1.description: CRT-era terminal fused with soft-extruded neumorphic panels. Green phosphor glow meets ergonomic depth.

T:2.name: style-systems/02-SOLAR FORGE
T:2.description: Molten metal workshop. Every control hand-forged from burning copper on deep carbon darkness.

T:3.name: style-systems/03-TOKYO DRIFT
T:3.description: Japanese city nightscape. Blue-black base with neon signage accents. Kanji-inspired grid. Utility meets urban poetry.

T:4.name: style-systems/04-ORBITAL DECK
T:4.description: Space station instrument panel. Cool grey neumorphic surfaces with warning-system chromatic alerts.

T:5.name: style-systems/05-ACID PRESS
T:5.description: Risograph/screen-print aesthetic. Paper texture, misregistered colors, halftone dots. Handmade meets digital.

T:6.name: style-systems/06-VELVET ENGINE
T:6.description: Luxury automotive dashboard meets music studio. Deep aubergine leather, rose gold accents, indicator lights.

T:7.name: style-systems/07-CONCRETE GARDEN
T:7.description: Brutalist architecture invaded by vivid botanical colour. Grey concrete, neon plant-like accents.

T:8.name: style-systems/08-RUST PROTOCOL
T:8.description: Post-industrial control room. Oxidized metallics, hazard stripes, functional beauty through age.

T:9.name: style-systems/09-NEON MONASTERY
T:9.description: Sacred geometry meets neon signage. Deep indigo void, gold leaf and electric cyan. Transcendent technology.

T:10.name: style-systems/10-PAPER MACHINE
T:10.description: Japanese stationery. Warm cream paper, ink stamps, thread-binding references. Precious and handcrafted.

T:11.name: style-systems/11-CHROMATIC BUNKER
T:11.description: Military operations center. Olive drab + saturated neon alerts. Tactical restraint with chromatic bursts.

T:12.name: style-systems/12-SILK CIRCUIT
T:12.description: Woven textile meets technology. Thread-thin borders, fabric-soft neumorphism. Stitched, not rendered.

T:13.name: style-systems/13-MERCURY POOL
T:13.description: Liquid metal surfaces. Chrome-like reflections, pooling highlights, silver neumorphism. Molten precision.

T:14.name: style-systems/14-EMBER SCOPE
T:14.description: Night-vision/thermal imaging. Black body with heat-map gradients. Data appears as thermal signatures.

T:15.name: style-systems/15-TAPE DECK
T:15.description: Cassette-era audio equipment. VU meters, mechanical counters, analog warmth. Press record.

T:16.name: style-systems/16-GLACIER BYTE
T:16.description: Arctic laboratory. Ice-blue neumorphic surfaces, hot coral alerts. Crystalline precision meets warmth.

T:17.name: style-systems/17-VOLT GARDEN
T:17.description: Electric greenhouse. Vivid chartreuse on deep soil brown. Growth + electricity. Botanical tech.

T:18.name: style-systems/18-INDIGO PROTOCOL
T:18.description: Aviation instrument panel. Deep navy, amber instruments, red alerts. Military precision and trust.

T:19.name: style-systems/19-CANDY MACHINE
T:19.description: Arcade claw machine turned serious. Bright primaries, coin-slot details, playful-precise controls.

T:20.name: style-systems/20-OBSIDIAN PRISM
T:20.description: Black glass surfaces refracting chromatic light. Rainbow edge-lighting on dark obsidian. Light through darkness.
